overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Haryana.

rules.title: Review Haryana Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Haryana Shops and Commercial Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: Haryana Shops and Commercial Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under Haryana labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and abstracts required under Haryana labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Haryana provisions governing working hours, overtime, rest intervals, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Haryana Shops and Commercial Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Applicability
rules.description: Verify whether Professional Tax obligations apply under the laws applicable in Haryana.

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Haryana Labour Welfare Fund, where applicable.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of statutory registrations, labour records, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for licence renewals, statutory filings, inspections and labour law due dates.
